tools.description: Write a Tavo data-library asset. Supports dryRun, expectedRevision, and clientRequestId.

tools.name: tavo_chat_copy
tools.description: Copy a Tavo chat through provider clone logic.

tools.description: Delete a Tavo chat through provider cleanup.

tools.description: Read one Tavo chat by id.

tools.description: Reset a Tavo chat messages/state.

tools.description: Search Tavo chats by display title.

tools.description: Update chat metadata, members, and overrides.

tools.name: tavo_current_chat_get
tools.description: Read the current active Tavo chat.

tools.description: Set the current active Tavo chat.

tools.name: tavo_input_append
tools.description: Append text to the current active chat input box.

tools.name: tavo_input_clear
tools.description: Clear the current active chat input box.

tools.name: tavo_input_get
tools.description: Read the current active chat input box text.

tools.name: tavo_input_send
tools.description: Send the current active chat input through input hooks and the normal chat flow. Returns when accepted, cancelled, busy, or rejected; it does not wait for generation.

tools.name: tavo_input_set
tools.description: Replace the current active chat input box text.
